identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Transform enterprise PMS from 'Data-Driven' to 'Decision-Driven' with a Premium, Calm, Uncluttered aesthetic.

rules: No 'Inter' for Headings. Use 'Manrope' or 'Plus Jakarta Sans'.
No Gradient Overload. Use texture and subtle borders.
Asymmetry creates interest. Use Bento Grids.

headings.usage: Page titles, Card headers, Modal titles

primary.description: Deep Charcoal/Slate 900 for Navigation and Structural Elements

accent.description: Muted Gold for Primary Actions, Active States, and High-Priority Calls

semantic_usage.card_bg: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all

sections.name: Command Center (Morning Brief)
sections.description: AI-driven summary of 'What Needs Attention'. Payments, VIPs, Dirty Rooms.

SmartActionPanel.description: A unified right-side drawer (Sheet) that replaces fragmented modals.
SmartActionPanel.customization: Remove default close button, use custom header with 'Decision' suggestions.

RoomCard.description: Live entity card for Room Board.

DecisionDialog.description: Intelligent dialog for Dirty Rooms / Payments.

DashboardWidget.style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm p-6 relative overflow-hidden

instructions_to_main_agent: TRANSFORM, DON'T JUST COPY: The goal is to change the UX model from 'Display Data' to 'Suggest Action'.
LANGUAGE: Use Turkish for all visible text labels (or i18n keys). 'Dikkat Gerektiren', 'Akıllı İşlemler', etc.
TESTING: Every interactive element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute. E.g., `data-testid='checkin-btn-room-302'`.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure contrast ratios. Use `aria-label` on icon-only buttons.
PERFORMANCE: Use `lazy` loading for the new panels if they are heavy.
CODE STRUCTURE: Create new components in `/app/frontend/src/components/` and pages in `/app/frontend/src/pages/`. Do not overwrite existing logic unless necessary for the UX upgrade.
DATA: Mock data is acceptable for the 'Intelligence' features if real backend endpoints are missing, but structure it to be easily replaced.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for the Action Panel overlay.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 for icons. Use clean Lucide icons (e.g., Sparkles, Brain, Zap).
